title: 宝塚記念の後に・燃える

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't... catch my breath...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Damn it, I lost! Cough... gasp...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, quit tryna kill yourself! C'mon, take deep
breaths!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Tamamo. And thanks.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It always bugged me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya started competin' before me, and meanwhile, I
was just wastin' away.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I finally got strong enough to actually
contend with ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya went 'n lost your fightin' spirit. Ya had no
spark anymore.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I dunno if it was 'cause of everyone watchin' ya or
whatever, but lettin' somethin' so stupid get to
ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And seein' ya mope around like dat, it really
pissed me off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But you've changed. At the Tenno Sho, and again
today, I could tell you were serious. Way more
than you were before.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now... you're not so bad.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So, did ya decide on your next race? If not, come
to the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap's competin' too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap, the Beast...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's a generation younger than us, but you
wouldn't think it! She doesn't play around!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: She set a record this year at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Her time was even faster than the Yasuda Kinen
record. And that's on the same track, over the
same 1,600 meters. Ya know what that means?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She's better than the seniors competing in G1
races...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Since you're tryna get serious, she's a good racer
to challenge. Besides, ya probably wanna settle
the score with me too, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh. You're right about that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll beat ya and Oguri at the same time. So ya
better enter, City!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And another thing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sayin' ya "just wanna run" like some dumb kid?
That's you through an' through. Don't ever
change.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon returning, Gold City tells me she wants to
compete in the Japan Cup. It'll be her chance to
put the culmination of all her hard work on
display!
